education.degree: Bachelor of Information Technology – Specialization in Computer Networks and Security

experience.description: Built a responsive website interface for an online cellphone shop using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Designed user-friendly layouts and implemented interactive features.
Developed a recruitment management application using C# (Windows Forms), handling candidate management and interview scheduling. Designed and implemented UI components.

Conducted independent research on wireless network security using Linux. Explored Wi-Fi password strength evaluation, performed MITM attack simulations, analyzed security risks, and studied defensive strategies.

Designed and implemented an English–Vietnamese machine translation system using Transformer model and GPT-based fine-tuning. Involved dataset preprocessing, model training with PyTorch, and evaluation using BLEU scores.

Guided students in programming fundamentals through game development and robotics projects. Designed interactive lessons, supported coding activities, and encouraged problem-solving. Gained experience in mentoring, communication, and adapting teaching methods.
